messages.content: Un momento, déjame revisar la agenda...
Disculpa, el sistema de citas está fallando un poco, pero no te preocupes, un asesor te llamará enseguida para agendar.

function.name: checkCalendarAvailability
function.description: Call this tool when the user asks for available appointment times. Do NOT call this if the user hasn't explicitly asked for an appointment or a time to come in. This tool requires no arguments. It will return the next available slots.

messages.content: Excelente, estoy agendando tu cita ahora mismo...
Hubo un pequeño error al guardar la cita, pero no te preocupes, te llamaremos para confirmarla manualmente.

function.name: bookAppointment
function.description: Call this tool to finalize and book the appointment AFTER the user has agreed to a specific time slot.

patient_name.description: The full name of the patient.

phone_number.description: The phone number of the patient in E.164 format (+1...).

appointment_date_time.description: The agreed upon appointment date and time in ISO 8601 format (e.g. 2026-06-20T10:00:00Z).
